checks.name: npm run validate
checks.evidence: 41 node tests passed; MDE parser checked project JSON/JSONL files; traceability validator checked required IDs through GEN-021 and boosted-tree LTR artifacts; fixture index check passed; fixture evaluation passed.

checks.name: node --test test/ltr.test.js
checks.evidence: Coordinate-ascent and boosted-tree LTR feature/training tests passed.

checks.name: npm run eval:cranfield:ltr -- --model boosted-trees --max-depth 3
checks.evidence: evaluation-ltr-boosted-trees-depth3-gen021.json records cross-validated nDCG@10 0.3216; evaluation-ltr-boosted-trees-depth3-k20-binary-gen021.json records binary nDCG@20 0.4457.

blocked_or_skipped.name: remote OpenSearch LTR plugin validation
blocked_or_skipped.reason: Deferred because offline cross-validated boosted-tree LTR did not beat refined PRF.

blocked_or_skipped.name: Cloudflare deploy verification
blocked_or_skipped.reason: No deployment was requested; GEN-021 leaves the public/default architecture unchanged.

high_findings.summary: ARCH-0.2-candidate refined prf-rerank remains candidate-only until BEIR transferability is measured.

medium_findings.summary: Boosted-tree LTR improves graded cross-validation but remains below refined PRF and regresses in binary cross-validation.

evidence_quality: GEN-021 validates a stronger local LTR model and records that pointwise boosted trees are still not promotion-quality under query-grouped cross-validation.
